case_title: BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE VS. NICK SKINAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE AS TO DEFENDANT SKINAS, NICK DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-26-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-22-2019 CONTINUED TO DEC-10-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-11-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-07-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200010448)
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT NICK SKINAS (TRANSACTION ID # 100064579) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-10-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-22-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF BARCLAYS BANK DELAWARE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-10-2019 CONTINUED TO FEB-11-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-07-2020 CONTINUED TO JUN-09-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-09-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST ALI DELFOROUSH, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-22-2019, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-22-2019. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-22-2019 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-11-2020 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610
